mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.images, p.category, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.view_count, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, u.username as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1

SELECT FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN post_favorite pf ON p.id = pf.post_id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY pf.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorite pf INNER JOIN post p ON pf.post_id = p.id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1

SELECT , CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_liked, CASE WHEN pf.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_favorited FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post_like pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN post_favorite pf ON p.id = pf.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (user_id, title, content, images, category) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{category})
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_top = #{isTop} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_essence = #{isEssence} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1
